description: Unified eval suite: coding and tool-calling. References pre-generated by Claude Opus into references.json.

function.name: create_appointment
function.description: Schedule a new appointment for a client

service_type.description: Service type: swedish_massage, deep_tissue, hot_stone, sports_massage, facial

appointment_date.description: Date of the appointment to cancel in YYYY-MM-DD format

function.name: check_availability
function.description: Check whether a specific time slot is available for booking

date.description: Date to check in YYYY-MM-DD format

time.description: Start time to check in HH:MM 24-hour format

coding_prompts.prompt: Write a Python function that implements a trie data structure with insert, search, and prefix-match methods. Include type hints and handle edge cases.

Write a bash script that monitors a directory for new CSV files and loads them into a SQLite database. The script should: detect new files using inotifywait, infer column names from CSV headers, create tables if they don't exist, and handle errors gracefully.

Implement an async rate limiter in Python using asyncio that supports: token bucket algorithm, configurable rate and burst size, and a decorator for rate-limiting async functions. Include proper error handling.

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. If required information is missing, ask for it rather than guessing.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: Book Sarah Chen for a 60-minute deep tissue massage on March 15th at 2:00 PM.
tool_call_prompts.notes: All fields provided explicitly. Tests basic tool invocation and argument mapping.

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. If required information is missing, ask for it rather than guessing.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: Can you get Marcus Webb in tomorrow morning at 9 for a half-hour deep tissue?
tool_call_prompts.notes: Requires: relative date resolution (tomorrow=2026-03-12), duration parsing (half-hour=30), service mapping (deep tissue=deep_tissue).

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. If required information is missing, ask for it rather than guessing.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: Schedule a hot rock session for Jennifer Kim, 90 minutes, March 22nd at 1:00 PM.
tool_call_prompts.notes: Tests service name normalization: 'hot rock session' → hot_stone.

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. If required information is missing, ask for it rather than guessing.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: Please cancel Priya Sharma's appointment on March 18th — she texted saying she'll be traveling for work.
tool_call_prompts.notes: Tests correct tool selection (cancel, not create) and ignoring irrelevant narrative detail.

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. If required information is missing, ask for it rather than guessing.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: Is this Saturday at 11am open for a 90-minute session? (2026-03-14)
tool_call_prompts.notes: Tests tool selection: availability check, not booking. Three tools available — must pick the right one.

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. Answer general questions from your knowledge without using tools.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: What's the difference between Swedish massage and deep tissue?
tool_call_prompts.notes: Model should NOT call any tool. Tests restraint — answering from general knowledge when no tool action is needed.

tool_call_prompts.system_prompt: You are a scheduling assistant for a wellness center. Today's date is 2026-03-11 (Wednesday). Use the available tools to fulfill booking requests. If required information is missing, ask for it rather than guessing.
tool_call_prompts.user_message: I'd like to book an appointment.
tool_call_prompts.notes: Missing: client name, service, date, time. Model must NOT call a tool with fabricated args — must ask for the missing information.
